property.tellus.world_scale.name: World Scale
property.tellus.tellus_managed_terrain_d: Lets Tellus cache the player-centered Distant Horizons area before distant terrain generation starts. Disable to use legacy Distant Horizons downloading.
property.tellus.show_terrain_download_ov: Shows compact Tellus terrain-cache progress at the top of the screen.
tellus.managed_terrain.overlay.title: Tellus terrain cache
tellus.managed_terrain.overlay.compatibi: The installed Distant Horizons build lacks the Tellus generation gate; using legacy mode.
tellus.managed_terrain.overlay.failed_de: %s required terrain cell(s) failed after retries.
property.tellus.thin_shell_terrain.name: Thin Shell Terrain
property.tellus.height_offset.name: Height Offset
property.tellus.max_altitude.name: Max Altitude
property.tellus.min_altitude.name: Min Altitude
property.tellus.underground_depth.name: Underground Depth
property.tellus.world_scale.tooltip: The number of real-world meters represented by one in-game block
property.tellus.thin_shell_terrain.toolt: Generates only the visible terrain surface with bedrock support below each column
property.tellus.auto_adjust.tooltip: Chooses the closest practical 1:1 terrain scale, then adjusts Height Offset and Min/Max Altitude so the terrain and selected underground depth fit without flattening.
tellus.preview.info.title: Terrain Info
tellus.preview.mode.tooltip: Switch between terrain-only 3D and 3D with preview trees and roads
property.tellus.terrestrial_height_scale: Elevation multiplier from meters to blocks for terrain above sea level
property.tellus.oceanic_height_scale.too: Elevation multiplier from meters to blocks for terrain below sea level
property.tellus.height_offset.tooltip: Vertical offset applied to terrain heights
property.tellus.max_altitude.tooltip: Upper world limit in blocks; set to Automatic at far left
property.tellus.min_altitude.tooltip: Lower world limit in blocks; set to Automatic at far left
property.tellus.underground_depth.toolti: How far solid terrain extends below the local surface. Vanilla caves, features, and underground structures remain within 64 blocks of the surface.
property.tellus.experimental_increase_he: Enables expanded-height terrain with ocean level at Y=0. Elevation follows the selected World Scale and Underground Depth.
Experimental: issues, crashes, broken worlds, and mod incompatibilities are expected.
tellus.experimental_increase_height.cont: Disabled because Increase Height controls altitude automatically.
tellus.experimental_increase_height.runt: Disabled until Minecraft is launched with %s.
tellus.experimental_increase_height.vali: Increase Height cannot be saved until Minecraft is launched with %s.
property.tellus.random_biomes.name: Random Biomes
property.tellus.trees_density.name: Tree Density
property.tellus.aquatic_vegetation.name: Aquatic Vegetation
property.tellus.random_biomes.tooltip: Mixes deterministic random land and ocean biome patches into the Earth biome map
property.tellus.biomes.tooltip: Allow this biome to be chosen for terrain-compatible random biome patches
property.tellus.random_biome_density.too: How often random biome patches override the climate-based biome
property.tellus.trees_density.tooltip: Density of trees across eligible biomes
property.tellus.aquatic_vegetation.toolt: Enables kelp and seagrass in water

property.tellus.realtime_time.name: Live Time
property.tellus.realtime_time.tooltip: Syncs in-game time to the real-world time at your location
property.tellus.realtime_weather.name: Real-Time Weather
property.tellus.realtime_weather.tooltip: Uses full real-world weather. When disabled, vanilla weather timing still uses real-world temperature to choose rain or snow
property.tellus.historical_snow.name: Historical Snow Coverage
property.tellus.historical_snow.tooltip: Applies snow based on recent snowfall and temperature history
property.tellus.historical_snow.rework.t: This feature is currently being reworked
property.tellus.voxy_chunk_pregen_enable: Generates full chunks around players so Voxy can ingest and render them
property.tellus.voxy_chunk_pregen_max_ra: Maximum chunk radius generated around each player for Voxy ingestion
property.tellus.voxy_chunk_pregen_chunks: Maximum chunks requested per server tick for Voxy pre-generation
property.tellus.locked.name: This feature is not currently available
property.tellus.enable_roads.name: Enable Roads
property.tellus.enable_buildings.name: Enable Buildings
property.tellus.enable_roads.tooltip: Generate OpenStreetMap road features where data is available
property.tellus.enable_buildings.tooltip: Generate Overture building footprints and 3D parts where data is available
property.tellus.climate_based_built_up_t: Use the Köppen-resolved biome surface for Overture urban land-cover areas instead of gravel or stone
tellus.openstreetmaps_features.scale_lim: Roads and buildings are disabled because they are only available when World Scale is 1:15 (15 m/block) or finer.
property.tellus.enable_roads.scale_limit: Disabled because roads are only available when World Scale is 1:15 (15 m/block) or finer.
property.tellus.enable_buildings.scale_l: Disabled because buildings are only available when World Scale is 1:15 (15 m/block) or finer.
tellus.validation.world_settings_failed: The selected world settings could not be applied safely.
tellus.data_sources.overture.title: Overture Maps land cover
tellus.data_sources.overture.description: Overture Maps base-theme vector land cover with adaptive zoom levels.
tellus.data_sources.overture.copyright: © Overture Maps Foundation; derived from ESA WorldCover 2020.
tellus.data_sources.overture.sentinel: Contains modified Copernicus Sentinel data processed by the ESA WorldCover consortium.
tellus.data_sources.overture.licenses: Licenses: ODbL (Overture base theme) / CC BY 4.0 (ESA WorldCover)
tellus.data_sources.overture.processing_: In-game processing: fetched as PMTiles ranges, rasterized for the selected scale,
and cached as compact local tiles for fast lookup.
tellus.data_sources.koppen.title: Köppen–Geiger climate classification (1 km, Beck et al. 2018)
tellus.data_sources.koppen.source: Source: Beck, H.E., Zimmermann, N.E., McVicar, T.R., et al. (2018).
tellus.data_sources.koppen.publication_1: Present and future Köppen–Geiger climate classification maps at 1-km resolution
tellus.data_sources.koppen.processing_1: In-game processing: reprojected and resampled to match the world grid.
tellus.data_sources.mapterhorn.title: Mapterhorn terrain DEM
tellus.data_sources.mapterhorn.processin: In-game processing: sampled from Mapterhorn Terrarium elevation tiles,
with zoom selected from player scale and cached locally for reuse.
tellus.data_sources.openwaters.title: OpenWaters bathymetry
tellus.data_sources.openwaters.source: OpenWaters ocean and inland-water bathymetry tiles
tellus.data_sources.openwaters.processin: In-game processing: used where the ocean mask agrees with missing or
non-positive Mapterhorn terrain; positive terrain overrides the mask.
tellus.data_sources.openmeteo.title: Open-Meteo (weather)
tellus.loading.attribution.land_cover: Land cover: © Overture Maps Foundation and OpenStreetMap contributors; derived from ESA WorldCover 2020 / modified Copernicus Sentinel data.
tellus.loading.attribution.climate: Climate zones: Köppen–Geiger climate classification (Beck et al., 2018) — CC BY 4.0.
tellus.loading.attribution.elevation: Elevation: Mapterhorn terrain / OpenWaters bathymetry — see Data Sources for required DEM attributions.

tellus.preload.title: Preload Terrain
tellus.preload.invalid_settings.detail: Review the selected preload settings and try again.
tellus.preload.cancel_cache_note: Completed downloads will remain in the shared cache.
tellus.preload.detail.stopping: Stopping workers and cleaning the unfinished package
tellus.preload.detail.complete_sources: Downloaded source files are ready; the area is too large for a processed terrain package at this scale.
tellus.preload.detail.complete_package: Downloaded sources and the processed terrain package are ready for fast world generation.
tellus.preload.detail.cancelled: Preload stopped. Completed downloads remain cached.
tellus.preload.detail.skip_land_cover: Skipping Overture land cover; the selected area is outside tile coverage
tellus.preload.detail.skip_land_mask: Skipping land-mask preload because land-mask data is unavailable
tellus.preload.detail.skip_dem_scale: Skipping DEM elevation preload because the world scale is invalid
tellus.preload.detail.no_dem_tiles: No DEM elevation tiles intersect the selected area
tellus.preload.detail.skip_infrastructur: Skipping OSM infrastructure tiles because the source is unavailable
tellus.preload.detail.skip_water: Skipping Overture water tiles because the source is unavailable
tellus.preload.detail.skip_sand: Skipping OSM sand tiles because the source is unavailable
tellus.preload.detail.skip_buildings: Skipping OSM building tiles because the source is unavailable
tellus.preload.detail.skip_roads: Skipping OSM road tiles because the source is unavailable
tellus.preload.detail.downloading_dem: Downloading %s DEM source tiles with bounded parallelism
tellus.preload.detail.unexpected_error: An unexpected error interrupted terrain preloading. Check the log for details.
